news.title: NASA launched an emergency mission to stop the Swift Observatory from crashing to Earth
news.summary: The Swift Observatory was launched in 2004, but recent solar storms have pushed its orbit lower, and it's in danger of burning up in Earth's atmosphere as soon as this year.
